title: Software Engineer
description:
**Company Description**

 SocioSpark is a dynamic digital marketing company based in Pune, specializing in LinkedIn marketing, social media management, and website design. We are dedicated to empowering startups, founders, and growing businesses to establish a strong online presence that fosters tangible growth. By combining strategic thinking, creative solutions, and performance\\-driven marketing, SocioSpark transforms brands into impactful digital assets. Our mission is to deliver sustainable systems that enhance brand visibility, authority, and measurable returns.
   




**Role Description**

 This is a full\\-time, remote position for a Software Engineer at SocioSpark. The selected candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining software solutions to support the company's digital marketing services. Key responsibilities include back\\-end web development, implementing programming solutions, enhancing system performance, and collaborating with cross\\-functional teams to meet project objectives. Strong problem\\-solving skills and adaptability are essential to excel in this role.
   




**Qualifications**
* Strong foundation in Computer Science and Software Development
* Proficiency in Back\\-End Web Development and Programming
* Experience with Object\\-Oriented Programming (OOP)
* Excellent problem\\-solving and analytical thinking abilities
* Ability to work effectively in remote teams and communicate clearly
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field is preferred
* Familiarity with web development frameworks and database management systems is a plus
* Experience in digital marketing tools or platforms would be advantageous

title: Linux Software Engineer - Ubuntu for Next-Gen Silicon (multiple roles and seniority levels)
description:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200\\+ colleagues in 75\\+ countries and very few office\\-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
   

  

 The company is founder\\-led, profitable, and growing.
   

  

 Canonical's Partner Engineering Team is looking for open\\-source enthusiasts to work across the full Linux stack to ensure new silicon technologies, such as new hardware accelerators, AI stacks, confidential computing, networking, virtualization, and containerization stacks, are optimized for new silicons.
   

  

 Partner Engineering works closely with worldwide silicon companies to optimize Ubuntu for their new silicon, from x86, ARM, RISC\\-V, PowerPC and s390x architectures.
   

  

 Location: This is a Globally remote role
   

  

 The role entails
   

  

* Collaborating proactively within a distributed team
* Fostering a software ecosystem with seamless user experience for all Ubuntu users
* Evaluating contributions of other engineers to maintain high\\-quality software standards.
* Playing a role in shaping the future of Ubuntu via both \\- new ideas in your areas of interest and advising on work being done elsewhere
* Collaborating with other teams in the Ubuntu and Debian communities, with upstream projects, and commercially supported customers
* Debugging issues on open source code and team maintained code.
* Helping our our customers to integrate their apps, SDKs, build OS images, optimize applications with Ubuntu Core, Desktop and Server
* Working with a team to maintain Ubuntu, silicon features, and silicon\\-optimized packages across platforms and technologies such as:
+ Servers, HPC and AI systems, IoT devices, PCs, SmartNICs and automotive systems
+ AI stacks
+ Graphics, audio and multimedia stacks
+ Virtualisation and Containers
+ Hardware enablement stacks
+ New architectures, architecture variants and optimized toolchains
+ Package management and dependencies
+ Platform security (secure boot, FDE, Ubuntu Core, Confidential Computing)

* Work from home with global travel 2 to 4 weeks for internal events


 What we are looking for in you
   

  

* Exceptional academic track record from both high school and university
* Undergraduate degree in a technical subject or a compelling narrative about your alternative chosen path
* You love technology and working with brilliant people
* You are curious, flexible, articulate, and accountable
* You value soft skills and are passionate, enterprising, thoughtful, and self\\-motivated
* You value building partnerships with a diverse set of internal and external groups
* Strong fundamentals in C, C\\+\\+ and Python
* Experience or interest in learning Linux distribution packaging
* Experience or Interest in open source maintenance or contribution and licenses
* Fundamental understanding of package management and dependency resolution


**Additional Skills That You Might Also Bring**
* Experience with one or more of the following:
+ Graphics, audio, or multimedia stacks
+ Virtualization and containers (Docker, OCI, Kubernetes)
+ Hardware enablement for platforms and devices, including SmartNICs, NVMe storage, GPUs, audio components, and sensors
+ Performance optimization
+ Toolchain development and maintenance
+ Networking protocols and technologies (TCP/IP, DHCP, HTTP/REST)
+ Security best practices
+ IoT and embedded systems, including board\\-level hardware, SoCs, BMCs, bootloaders, firmware, operating systems, applications, and services


 What we offer colleagues
   

  

 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance\\-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice\\-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Team Member Assistance Program \\& Wellness Platform
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass and travel upgrades for long\\-haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm that is at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world on a daily basis. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence \\- in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Canonical has been a remote\\-first company since its inception in 2004\\. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

 Canonical is an equal opportunity employer
   

  

 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: Principal Software Engineer
description:
**About the Role** 




 The Principal Software Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high\\-quality software products that align with business requirements and exceed customer expectations. As a key member of the development team, this role involves close collaboration with product management, QA teams, and other stakeholders to drive a robust development process supporting the company growth objectives. The ideal candidate will bring extensive expertise in full stack software development, strong problem\\-solving skills, and the ability to effectively communicate and collaborate across cross\\-functional teams.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Provide technical guidance and mentorship to Software Engineers, fostering a collaborative and growth\\-oriented environment.
* Design and develop complex front\\-end and back\\-end components of web applications, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.
* Develop clean, efficient, and well\\-documented code, adhering to high standards for coding practices and quality.
* Collaborate with product management to define product roadmaps, prioritize features, and align development efforts with business goals.
* Develop responsive and intuitive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, KnockoutJS, Angular, and NgRx, adhering to UI/UX best practices and accessibility standards.
* Develop robust server\\-side solutions using C\\#, .NET 9, and other relevant technologies, ensuring scalability, performance, and maintainability.
* Implement and optimize background job processing using tools like Hangfire to enhance application efficiency and reliability.
* Design and implement RESTful APIs, ensuring seamless integration with front\\-end applications and alignment with industry best practices.
* Integrate third\\-party APIs and services to extend application functionality and enhance capabilities.
* Manage and optimize Elastic Search to deliver efficient and scalable search functionalities within applications.
* Utilize Git or similar version control systems for code management, ensuring collaboration and codebase integrity.
* Participate in code reviews, maintaining high standards of code quality, consistency, and security.
* Develop and execute comprehensive unit tests, integration tests, and end\\-to\\-end tests to validate application functionality and performance.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, providing support to team members as needed to ensure timely resolution.
* Conduct root cause analysis of defects and issues and clearly communicate findings to relevant stakeholders.
* Participate in agile ceremonies (e.g., sprint planning, daily stand\\-ups, retrospectives) to align testing efforts with team goals and objectives.
* Prioritize and manage multiple tasks effectively in a fast\\-paced environment.
* Work independently and take ownership of assigned tasks while being a strong team player.
* Demonstrate a solid understanding of the business domain and end\\-user requirements to ensure development efforts deliver value to customers.
* Collaborate effectively with team members to break down tasks, estimate efforts accurately, and deliver features incrementally to meet project milestones and deadlines.



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Software Engineering, or a related field. Master’s degree preferred.
* 12\\+ years of experience in full stack software development.



  





**Required Skills** 



* Proven expertise in C\\#, .NET Core or .NET 9, and other relevant technologies in web development.
* Strong understanding of front\\-end frameworks such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, KnockoutJS, Angular, and NgRx.
* Deep knowledge of Web API development principles and best practices.
* Experience in managing and optimizing databases, including SQL Server and Elastic Search.
* Proficiency in background job processing using tools like Hangfire.
* Extensive experience with Azure and AWS cloud platforms.
* Experience with Agile methodologies and tools, including Git for version control and JIRA for project management and issue tracking.
* Experience with microservices architecture.
* Experience working within a Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) process.
* Knowledge of software builds, testing, and CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, Git).
* Ability to take initiative, offer suggestions, and provide resolutions proactively.
* Passion for delivering business value and willingness to perform other assigned tasks.
* Ability to provide regular updates, system solutions, and communicate issues to the management team.
* Constantly strive to learn new technologies and stay up to date in the rapidly changing industry.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to effectively collaborate with cross\\-functional teams.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Experience with microservices architecture.
* Experience working within a Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery (CI/CD) process.



  





**Pay range and compensation package** 




 20\\-26 LPA (Including variables)
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




 We are committed to diversity and inclusivity.

title: Senior Embedded Product Development Engineer
description:
**1\\.  Role Overview:** 




 We are looking for a highly experienced Senior Product Development Engineer with strong expertise in Embedded Hardware or Software Development, basic\\-to\\-moderate knowledge in Hardware or Software Design, and deep hands\\-on experience with Microcontrollers and Processors used in IoT and Industrial Automation.
 



 The candidate will lead development of advanced products such as wireless transmitters, battery\\-powered IoT devices and smart edge\\-processing devices.
 



 This is an end\\-to\\-end role across concept → architecture → processor \\+ hardware selection → firmware → testing → certification → production.
 



  





**2\\.  Processor / Microcontroller Skills:** 




 The candidate must have strong real\\-world experience with:
 



 ·      ARM Cortex–M Series
 



 ·      STM32L4 / L5 / F4 / F7 / G0 series
 



 ·      Low\\-power optimization on Cortex\\-M0/M3/M4/M33
 



 ·      Bootloader development, memory mapping, IRQ handling
 



 ·      ESP32 Family
 



 ·      WiFi \\+ BLE
 



 ·      IDF, FreeRTOS porting, OTA updates
 



 ·      Optimizing tasks and heap for mixed wireless \\+ sensor applications
 



 ·      Linux\\-Based Processors of STM/NXP/Ti or any other (Preferred)
 



 ·      Low\\-power design for battery\\-powered devices
 



 ·      Multi\\-threaded RTOS architecture
 



 ·      Interrupt\\-driven design
 



 ·      DMA\\-based data acquisition
 



 ·      High\\-speed ADC sampling and signal processing
 



 ·      Modbus/TCP for Linux processors
 



  





**3\\.  Key Responsibilities:** 




**A.  Product Architecture \\& Design** 




 ·    Select the right processor/microcontroller based on power, cost, memory, communications, and product roadmap.
 



 ·    Create firmware architectures for sensors, communications, storage, display, and power subsystems.
 



 ·    Evaluate LoRa/GSM/BLE module integration with processor pins, clocks, power rails, and interfaces.
 



 ·    Finalize hardware–firmware interaction architecture.
 



  





**B.  Firmware Development:** 




 ·    Develop firmware in C/C\\+\\+ on STM32, ESP32, and Linux processors.
 



 ·    Multi\\-tasking using FreeRTOS or other RTOS frameworks.
 



 ·    Drivers for ADC, DAC, SPI, I2C, UART, CAN, USB.
 



 ·    Sensor reading, filtering, calibration logic.
 



 ·    Power\\-optimized firmware for battery\\-operated IoT devices.
 



 ·    Bootloader, OTA, DFU implementation for all processor families.
 



 ·    Develop edge intelligence logic for advanced controllers.
 



  





**C.  Hardware Coordination:** 




 ·    Participate in schematic review, power tree validation, and PCB layout evaluation.
 



 ·    Validate processor\\-related power supply design (buck/boost, LDOs, decoupling).
 



 ·    Review EMI/EMC compliance and test findings for processor blocks.
 



 ·    Assist hardware team for debugging using SWD/JTAG, scope, LA.
 



  





**D. Testing, Field Execution \\& Certification:** 




 ·    Full hardware\\-software integration testing.
 



 ·    Environmental testing support (thermal chamber, vibration, IP).
 



 ·    EMI/EMC pre\\-compliance debugging.
 



 ·    Field testing for LoRa range, GSM connectivity, noise immunity.
 



  





**4\\.  Required Skills:** 




 ·      Core Technical Skills
 



 ·      Strong embedded C/C\\+\\+
 



 ·      STM32 \\+ ESP32 hands\\-on experience (5\\+ years combined)
 



 ·      RTOS (FreeRTOS mandatory), multi\\-tasking
 



 ·      ADC/DAQ architecture understanding
 



 ·      Communication protocols:
 



 ·      LoRa/LoRaWAN
 



 ·      BLE/WiFi
 



 ·      MQTT
 



 ·      CAN, RS485 (Modbus RTU/TCP)
 



 ·      Debugging tools: JTAG, SWD, logic analyzer
 



 ·      Hardware understanding: power tree, analog front\\-ends, PCB review

**7\\.  Personal Attributes:**

title: Unity 3D Developer
description:
**Company Description** 



* Digital Agents Interactive Pvt. Ltd. (DAI) is an advanced technology company specializing in
 **XR (Extended Reality), Artificial Intelligence, and simulation technologies** 
 for training, mission planning, industrial operations, and digital transformation.
* Our solutions leverage
 **Virtual Reality (VR), Augmented Reality (AR), Mixed Reality (MR), AI\\-driven analytics, and immersive 3D environments** 
 to create next\\-generation simulation platforms used across
 **defence, healthcare, manufacturing, and enterprise sectors** 
 .
* We design and develop
 **high\\-fidelity simulation systems, digital twins, immersive training modules, and operational visualization platforms** 
 that enable organizations to improve decision\\-making, training effectiveness, and operational efficiency.
* Our vision is to seamlessly integrate
 **physical and digital environments** 
 to build intelligent simulation systems that enhance learning, preparedness, and operational readiness.
* Join us to
 **innovate, build cutting\\-edge simulation systems, and shape the future of immersive technology applications across critical industries.**



  





**Role Description** 



* This is a
 **full\\-time on\\-site role for a Unity XR Developer** 
 located in
 **Gurugram** 
 .
* The Unity XR Developer will be responsible for
 **designing, developing, and optimizing immersive simulation applications using Unity** 
 . These applications will support
 **training, operational visualization, and simulation use cases** 
 across industries such as
 **defence, healthcare, and manufacturing** 
 .
* Responsibilities include development of
 **VR/AR applications, real\\-time 3D simulations, interactive training modules, and immersive visualization systems** 
 while following object\\-oriented programming principles and real\\-time performance optimization techniques.
* The role also requires
 **collaboration with designers, artists, hardware engineers, and AI teams** 
 to deliver high\\-quality immersive simulation solutions.



  





**Responsibilities:** 



* Act as a bridge between
 **3D artists, simulation designers, and software developers** 
 , facilitating communication and asset pipeline between development and art teams.
* Participate in
 **technical design discussions and project planning meetings** 
 to review development progress, identify technical challenges, and propose innovative solutions.
* Review
 **simulation design documents and technical specifications** 
 to determine the architecture and technical requirements of XR simulation systems.
* Design, develop, and optimize
 **interactive simulation applications and immersive XR experiences** 
 for platforms including
 **PC, mobile, VR headsets, and AR/MR devices** 
 .
* Develop
 **real\\-time training environments and operational simulations** 
 for sectors such as
 **defence, healthcare, manufacturing, and industrial operations** 
 .
* Integrate
 **haptic feedback systems** 
 such as gloves, vests, or specialized hardware into simulation environments using available SDKs and APIs.
* Collaborate with hardware and electronics teams to
 **fine\\-tune tactile feedback and interaction systems** 
 for training and simulation applications.
* Troubleshoot issues related to
 **device compatibility, performance optimization, and synchronization between visual, physical, and haptic systems** 
 .
* Research, define, maintain, and improve
 **development workflows, content pipelines, and technical frameworks** 
 to enhance development efficiency.
* Develop
 **tools and frameworks that enable artists and designers to efficiently integrate assets into simulation environments** 
 .
* Implement
 **interactive mechanics, simulation logic, UI/UX systems, and visualization tools** 
 using Unity Engine.
* Collaborate with backend developers to
 **integrate real\\-time simulation data with server\\-side systems, analytics platforms, and databases** 
 .
* Support prototyping teams in developing
 **mockups, wireframes, and interactive prototypes** 
 for simulation platforms.
* Communicate development progress, technical challenges, and deliverables clearly to internal teams and stakeholders.
* Collaborate with
 **external partners, research institutions, and enterprise clients** 
 to understand requirements and deliver high\\-quality simulation solutions.
* Participate in
 **innovation discussions and R\\&D initiatives** 
 to explore new technologies in XR, AI, and immersive simulation.
* Contribute to the development of
 **internal SDKs, tools, libraries, and reusable frameworks** 
 to streamline simulation development processes.
* Respond constructively to feedback and
 **refine solutions to meet client and project requirements** 
 .
* Create
 **technical documentation and specification sheets** 
 to support development and integration efforts.
* Test new tools, plugins, and frameworks before deployment into production environments.
* Track and report bugs, manage issue logs, and help prioritize development improvements.



  





**Qualification Criteria** 



* Minimum
 **3\\+ years of hands\\-on experience as a Unity Developer** 
 in real\\-time 3D application development.
* Strong experience developing
 **interactive applications using Unity Engine** 
 , preferably with projects related to simulation, XR, or visualization.
* Proficiency in
 **C\\# programming and object\\-oriented design principles** 
 .
* Experience working with
 **WebGL\\-based frameworks such as Three.js or PlayCanvas** 
 is a strong advantage.
* Familiarity with
 **XR development technologies and devices** 
 including platforms such as
 **Meta Quest, HTC Vive, HoloLens, Varjo, or similar XR systems** 
 .
* Experience developing applications for
 **WebGL, iOS, Android, and PC platforms** 
 .
* Basic familiarity with
 **web technologies including HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript** 
 .
* Strong understanding of
 **3D mathematics, physics systems, and real\\-time graphics programming concepts** 
 .
* Knowledge of
 **geometry processing, texture mapping, lighting models, and shader concepts** 
 .
* Experience building
 **high\\-performance real\\-time applications optimized for multiple platforms and hardware environments** 
 .
* Understanding of
 **platform\\-specific optimization and compatibility considerations for immersive applications** 
 .
* Experience with
 **multi\\-user or networked simulation environments** 
 , including client\\-server architectures and real\\-time synchronization.
* Familiarity with networking frameworks such as
 **Photon, Mirror, or similar multiplayer synchronization systems** 
 .
* Experience using
 **version control systems such as Git or SVN** 
 and collaborative development workflows.
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and the ability to work effectively in a
 **fast\\-paced R\\&D environment** 
 .
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to
 **explain technical concepts to non\\-technical stakeholders** 
 .
* Interest in
 **XR technologies, simulation systems, and AI\\-driven immersive platforms** 
 .
* Positive attitude, strong work ethic, and ability to work collaboratively within multidisciplinary teams.
* Ability to
 **prioritize tasks, manage multiple development streams, and deliver projects on schedule** 
 .
* Good knowledge of Unity features including
 **shader development, prefab architecture, particle systems, lighting, and UI frameworks** 
 .
* Provide technical troubleshooting support to the development team when required.
* Ability to work with
 **minimal supervision and creatively solve complex technical challenges** 
 in real\\-time simulation systems.
